markets.no_sub_title: 127+ consecutive games
markets.rules_primary: If Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores 20+ points in at least 127 consecutive Pro Basketball regular season games before May 15, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Consecutive Games Definition

A "consecutive game" requires Shai Gilgeous-Alexander to appear and record statistics in that game.

Streak Rules

Counts toward streak: Regular season games where Shai plays and scores 20+ points
Does not count: Games where Shai scores fewer than 20 points
Does not break streak: Games where Shai does not play (injury, rest, suspension, or any other reason)
